metadata.application: Academic Resolve - Book Dispute Resolution System
metadata.description: Lost/Damaged Book Dispute & Settlement Application for Educational Institutions
metadata.author: Academic Resolve Development Team

component.name: x_1997678_acad_resolve_book_incident
component.description: Main incident table for book disputes

component.name: x_1997678_acad_resolve_fee_schedule
component.description: Fee calculation reference table

component.name: x_1997678_acad_resolve_approval
component.description: Approval workflow tracking table

component.name: Auto Calculate Fee
component.description: Automatically calculates incident fee based on damage type and level

component.name: Notify Library on Incident
component.description: Sends notification to library staff when new incident is created

component.name: Close Incident on Payment
component.description: Automatically closes incident when payment is recorded

component.name: Validate Incident Data
component.description: Validates required incident fields before saving

component.name: Set Priority by Damage
component.description: Sets incident priority based on damage level and book value

component.name: Validate Incident Form
component.description: Validates form before submission to server

component.name: Calculate Fee Preview
component.description: Updates fee preview when damage level or book value changes

component.name: Show/Hide Fields Based on Type
component.description: Shows/hides relevant fields based on damage type selection

component.name: Check User Permissions
component.description: Checks user role and enables/disables fields accordingly

component.name: Handle Photo Upload
component.description: Manages photo attachment uploads and validation

component.name: Create Payment Request
component.description: Initiates payment process for incident fee

component.name: Approve Replacement
component.description: Marks item as approved for replacement

component.name: Send for Review
component.description: Escalates incident to library manager for review

component.name: Close Dispute
component.description: Closes the dispute with final notes

component.name: Get AI Assessment
component.description: Requests Copilot AI to assess the dispute

component.name: Reject Dispute
component.description: Rejects the dispute claim with explanation

component.name: Incident Created
component.description: Notifies library staff when student creates incident report

component.name: Incident Confirmation
component.description: Sends confirmation email to student after creating incident

component.name: Approval Requested
component.description: Sends approval request to designated reviewer/manager

component.name: Dispute Approved
component.description: Notifies student that dispute has been approved

component.name: Dispute Rejected
component.description: Notifies student that dispute claim has been rejected

component.name: Payment Received
component.description: Confirms payment received and case closed

component.name: Replacement Completed
component.description: Notifies student that replacement book is ready for pickup

component.name: Payment Gateway Connector
component.description: Integrates with external payment gateway to process payments

component.name: SMTP Email Service
component.description: Sends email notifications via SMTP server

component.name: Copilot AI Assessment
component.description: Integrates with Copilot for AI-driven dispute assessment

component.name: LMS Student Verification
component.description: Verifies student status in LMS before processing claims

component.name: Analytics Event Tracking
component.description: Sends incident data to analytics platform for reporting

component.name: Incident Intake Flow
component.description: Captures and categorizes incident from student submission

component.name: Incident Approval Workflow
component.description: Routes approval requests to library staff and managers

component.name: Payment Processing Flow
component.description: Handles payment collection and incident resolution

component.name: Incident Escalation Flow
component.description: Escalates unresolved incidents to management

component.name: Report Book Incident
component.description: Allows students to report lost or damaged books

component.name: My Incidents
component.description: Shows student's open and recent incidents

component.name: Payment Portal
component.description: Secure payment processing for incident fees

component.name: Help & FAQ
component.description: Frequently asked questions about book disputes

component.name: acad_resolve.admin
component.description: Academic Resolve Administrator - Full system access

component.name: acad_resolve.library_staff
component.description: Academic Resolve Library Staff - Can review and manage incidents

component.name: acad_resolve.student
component.description: Academic Resolve Student - Can create and view own incidents

component.name: acad_resolve.approver
component.description: Academic Resolve Approver - Approves disputes and fees

component.name: Fluent API
component.description: Main API routes for incident management and business logic

configuration_steps.step: 1. Install required plugins (Integration Hub, Flow Designer, Service Portal)
3. Create user roles and assign permissions
4. Configure Integration Hub connections with credentials
6. Add client scripts and UI actions
